message: Fix accessibility, type safety, and cleanup across 5 files app/icon.tsx, app/opengraph-image.tsx: - Added alt="" to elements inside the OG/icon image generators. While these are server-rendered images (not user- facing HTML), the React JSX linter flags missing alt attributes and some build pipelines treat them as errors lib/site-state.tsx: - Replaced (window as any).webkitAudioContext with a properly typed intermediate variable: extracts webkitAudioContext from Window via intersection type, then uses AudioContext || WebkitAudioContext with a null guard before construction. This eliminates the last `any` cast in the site state provider app/architecture/page.tsx: - Removed unused useScroll, useTransform, useSpring imports from framer-motion - Removed unused scrollYProgress and scaleProgress variables from the component body (these were remnants of a scroll-driven animation that was removed in an earlier refactor) .gitignore: - Added .bv/ directory (beads viewer local config and caches) to prevent local tooling state from being committed Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6

files.patch:
@@ -43,3 +43,6 @@ next-env.d.ts

 /screenshots_and_demo_video/
 /public/videos/*.mp4
